findings.description: The PDF uses a two-column layout for the financial data (FY 2020-2021 on the left, Duration of Program on the right), but the HTML converts this into a single three-column table, collapsing the two distinct side-by-side sections into one unified table structure.
findings.evidence: PDF shows two visually separate sections with their own headers ('Receipts:' and 'Disbursements:' appearing twice, once per column). HTML renders this as a single table with columns 'Category', 'FY 2020-2021 (through 3/31/21)', and 'Duration of Program (through 3/31/21)'.

findings.description: Dash/hyphen values in the FY 2020-2021 column are rendered as '$-' in the HTML rather than showing just a dash, which slightly changes the visual representation of zero/null values.
findings.evidence: PDF shows '-' for items like Rebate, Interest, Dept. of Revenue Admin, etc. in the FY column. HTML shows '$ -' for these same values.

findings.description: The DSCA Site Statistics section in the PDF uses a simple two-column layout with labels on the left and numbers on the right. The HTML converts this into a formal table with 'Statistic' and 'Count' headers, which is functionally equivalent but structurally different.
findings.evidence: PDF shows a simple list-style format with a bold header. HTML shows a table with header row containing 'Statistic' and 'Count' columns.

findings.description: The PDF presents fund statistics as two side-by-side sections (FY 2020-2021 and Duration of Program), each with their own Receipts and Disbursements subsections. The HTML merges these into a single table with three columns. While the data values are preserved, the original structure of two separate financial statements is altered into a combined table format. This is an acceptable structural choice, but the 'Receipts:' and 'Disbursements:' rows are presented as section label rows within the table, which matches the PDF's structure.
findings.evidence: The PDF has two distinct columns of financial data; the HTML combines them into one table with Category, FY 2020-2021, and Duration of Program columns. All numerical values match correctly.
